steps.title: Identify what the blank describes
steps.content: The phrase “in a single design” signals that the blank must name what happens when different materials come together into one unified whole.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: Synthesis—the joining of different elements to create something coherent—describes precisely what happens when contemporary and traditional materials exist “in a single design.” Designation (naming), analysis (examining), and diffusion (dispersing) refer to different processes. That matches choice D — D is correct.
